output_summary.refresh_scope_binding: Run mode candidate, metadata pointers and status refs only.
output_summary.metadata_delta_inventory: Driver events and required actions for stale-ref inventory, pointer refresh, owner-decision preservation, blocked/refreshed/stale labels, lineage candidate, and boundary note.
output_summary.rag_surface_inventory: Each listed surface receives expected refresh or preserve-ref-only handling.
output_summary.rag_manifest_refresh_packet: Replace old workflow-id refs where resolvable, update projection metadata ref, add stale/refreshed/blocked markers, retain owner decision refs without approval.
output_summary.source_slice_card_refresh_set: Per-card old workflow-id, superseded projection, and unresolved mapping handling.
output_summary.source_slice_triage_refresh_packet: Ref health buckets: refreshed, stale, blocked_by_ref.
output_summary.source_slice_review_refresh_packet: Review queue metadata refresh without changing approval state.
output_summary.source_slice_decision_packet_refresh: Decision packet pointer refresh without candidate-to-approval conversion.
output_summary.metadata_index_refresh_packet: Artifact, status, and lineage indexes refreshed as metadata.
output_summary.graph_lens_export_candidate: Metadata graph nodes and edges are navigation-only candidates.
output_summary.provenance: Synthetic fixture only; no execution claim.
output_summary.gaps: Needs concrete new workflow ref, projection version, surface ref tables, and lineage policy before real application.
output_summary.downstream_handoff: Resolve refs, apply annotations, optionally emit metadata lineage event, and submit owner-decision candidates without approval implication.
output_summary.no_claims: No source truth, answer authority, owner approval, ontology/canon promotion, default-route switch, or command execution claim.
